scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run start:dev --workspace backend" "npm run dev --workspace frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @moul-hanout/shared-types && npm run build --workspace @moul-hanout/shared-utils && npm run build --workspace backend && npm run build --workspace frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace backend && npm run lint --workspace frontend
scripts.check:shared: npm run build --workspace @moul-hanout/shared-types && npm run build --workspace @moul-hanout/shared-utils
scripts.check:frontend: npm run lint --workspace frontend && npm run build --workspace frontend
scripts.check:backend: npm run generate:prisma && npm run test --workspace backend && npm run test:e2e --workspace backend && npm run build --workspace backend
scripts.verify: npm run check:shared && npm run check:backend && npm run check:frontend
